name: Josera Dog - Maxi Adult Chicken & Rice 12.5kg
shortDescription: For large dogs and dogs that tend not to chew properly. A food for our insatiable connoisseurs, specially tailored to their requirements! The extra-large kibble size offers plenty of chewing fun and prevents excessive gobbling. With an increased fibre content for greater satiation and a reduced fat content, also suitable for our well-nourished chowhounds
description: Composition: poultry 29.0 %; rice; whole grain corn; poultry fat; dried salmon 4.0 %; plant fibre; beet fibre; hydrolysed poultry protein; minerals; yeast; ground chicory root (natural source of inulin); dried meat from the New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus). Product Details: A food for our insatiable connoisseurs, specially tailored to their requirements! The extra-large kibble size offers plenty of chewing fun and prevents excessive gobbling. With an increased fibre content for greater satiation and a reduced fat content, also suitable for our well-nourished chowhounds. . Extra-large kibble size for big dogs . Helps to reduce gorging . With increased fibre content for greater satiation and a moderate fat content . With salmon for tasty indulgence
